sections.heading: What is Upper Row?
sections.body: Learn keys above the home row: Q, W, E, R, T, Y, U, I, O, P. This lesson covers the essential concepts you need to understand to get started effectively.

sections.heading: Key Concepts
sections.body:
Upper Row is a fundamental concept that every developer needs to master. Here are the core ideas:

1. Core Principle: The main idea behind Upper Row is understanding how different components work together.

2. Application: In practice, you'll use Upper Row every day when building applications. It's one of those skills that becomes second nature.

3. Common Patterns: Most Upper Row implementations follow predictable patterns. Once you recognize them, you can apply them quickly.

sections.heading: Why This Matters
sections.body: Understanding Upper Row is crucial because it builds the foundation for everything that follows. Master this topic and you'll find subsequent concepts much easier to learn.
